author: Planner Agent

overview.purpose: To migrate the Financial AI application from Google Gemini models to Mistral AI models while maintaining all existing functionality and improving performance
overview.scope: This migration includes updating the backend LLM service, chat functionality, and financial analysis generation components

business_goals: Reduce API costs by migrating to more cost-effective Mistral models
Maintain or improve response quality and performance
Ensure long-term sustainability of the LLM backend

success_metrics.target: 20% reduction in monthly LLM API costs
success_metrics.measurement: Compare monthly bills before and after migration

success_metrics.target: Maintain or improve analysis quality scores
success_metrics.measurement: User satisfaction surveys and quality assessment tests

success_metrics.target: Maintain response times within 10% of current levels
100% of existing functionality working with Mistral

functional_requirements.title: Mistral API Integration
functional_requirements.description: The system shall integrate with Mistral AI API using the official Python client library
acceptance_criteria: Mistral client library successfully installed and configured
API authentication working with environment variables
All API calls properly handle errors and rate limits

functional_requirements.title: Financial Analysis Generation
functional_requirements.description: The system shall generate financial analysis using Mistral models with equivalent quality to Gemini
acceptance_criteria: Analysis includes all required sections (trends, risks, valuation, recommendation)
Response format matches current markdown output
Analysis quality validated through comparative testing

functional_requirements.title: Chat Functionality
functional_requirements.description: The system shall support interactive chat sessions using Mistral models
acceptance_criteria: Chat history properly maintained and formatted for Mistral API
Streaming responses work correctly
Chat quality comparable to current Gemini implementation

functional_requirements.title: Error Handling
functional_requirements.description: The system shall implement robust error handling for Mistral API
acceptance_criteria: Rate limit errors handled gracefully with retry logic
Authentication errors provide clear messages
API errors logged appropriately

functional_requirements.title: Configuration Management
functional_requirements.description: The system shall support easy configuration of Mistral model parameters
acceptance_criteria: Model selection configurable via environment variables
API key management secure and flexible
Timeout and retry settings configurable

non_functional_requirements.title: Performance
non_functional_requirements.description: API response times shall be within 10% of current Gemini performance
acceptance_criteria: Average response time < 2.5 seconds for analysis generation
95th percentile response time < 4 seconds
No significant degradation in chat response times

non_functional_requirements.title: Reliability
non_functional_requirements.description: System shall maintain 99.9% uptime during and after migration
acceptance_criteria: Error rate < 1% for LLM API calls
Proper fallback mechanisms in place
Monitoring alerts configured for API issues

non_functional_requirements.title: Security
non_functional_requirements.description: All API communications shall be secure and credentials properly protected
acceptance_criteria: API keys stored securely in environment variables
No hardcoded credentials in source code
HTTPS used for all API communications

non_functional_requirements.title: Maintainability
non_functional_requirements.description: Code shall be well-documented and follow project conventions
acceptance_criteria: Code comments updated for new implementation
Documentation updated with Mistral-specific information
Follows existing code style and patterns

user_stories.title: As a user, I want the financial analysis to be generated using Mistral models
user_stories.description: Users should receive the same quality of financial analysis but potentially with improved performance
acceptance_criteria: Analysis includes all current sections
Response format remains consistent
Analysis quality validated through testing

user_stories.title: As a developer, I want clear documentation for the Mistral integration
user_stories.description: Developers need to understand how to work with the new Mistral implementation
acceptance_criteria: Updated README with Mistral setup instructions
Code comments explaining key differences
Migration guide for future reference

user_stories.title: As a DevOps engineer, I want proper monitoring for the Mistral API
user_stories.description: Need to monitor API usage, performance, and errors
acceptance_criteria: API usage metrics collected
Error rate monitoring in place
Performance dashboards updated

input_data.name: Chat History
input_data.format: List of message objects with role and content

data_requirements.data_migration: None required - this is an API provider change, not a data migration

assumptions: Mistral API will be available and stable during migration
Current usage patterns will remain similar post-migration
Mistral models can produce equivalent quality analysis to Gemini
API pricing will be cost-effective compared to Gemini
constraints: Migration must be completed within 2-week timeline
Must maintain backward compatibility with existing frontend
Budget for API costs must not exceed current Gemini spending
dependencies: Mistral AI API account and credentials

risks.description: Mistral API rate limits could impact performance
risks.mitigation: Implement caching, optimize prompt size, monitor usage closely

risks.description: Response quality degradation with Mistral models
risks.mitigation: Conduct thorough comparative testing, adjust prompts as needed

risks.description: Unexpected API changes or downtime from Mistral
risks.mitigation: Maintain Gemini fallback during transition, implement circuit breakers
Monitor costs closely, optimize token usage, consider different models

test_types: User acceptance testing for quality validation
test_data: Sample SEC filings for major companies

trigger_conditions: Major quality issues reported by users
rollback_steps: Switch back to Gemini API using feature flag
Communicate with users about temporary change
Investigate and fix issues before re-attempting migration

open_questions: What is the exact pricing comparison between current Gemini usage and proposed Mistral models?
Are there any specific Mistral model recommendations for financial analysis use cases?
What monitoring tools are currently in place that can be extended for Mistral API monitoring?
Should we implement a gradual rollout to a subset of users first?
